easing_cycle_ended.claim: Banxico declared its two-year easing cycle over at the May 7, 2026 meeting, signaling a shift to a more cautious stance.

provenance.definition: Banxico declared its two-year easing cycle over at the May 7, 2026 meeting, signaling a shift to a more cautious stance.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: all levels sparse (total 1 usable case(s)); rate is wide by construction

cases.description: Banxico ends easing cycle with split vote, citing contraction and upward inflation revision.
cases.basis_quote: The central bank cited a contraction in economic activity and revised its inflation forecast for Q2 2026 upward to 4.1%, while targeting convergence to its 3% goal by Q2 2027.

internal_disagreement_persists.claim: The 3-2 split at the May 7, 2026 meeting indicates meaningful internal disagreement on the board, with two members preferring to hold rates.

provenance.definition: The 3-2 split at the May 7, 2026 meeting indicates meaningful internal disagreement on the board, with two members preferring to hold rates.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: all levels sparse (total 1 usable case(s)); rate is wide by construction

cases.description: Banxico's May 7, 2026 vote was 3-2, with Heath and Espinosa dissenting in favor of a hold.
cases.basis_quote: Board members Jonathan Heath and Irene Espinosa Cantellano dissented, preferring to hold the rate at 6.75%.

provenance.definition: All five Governing Board members vote for the same policy action (hold, cut, or hike) at the scheduled meeting.
provenance.inclusion_criteria: Official Banxico statement or minutes showing a 5-0 vote for the same action.
provenance.exclusion_criteria: Any vote split (4-1, 3-2, etc.) or meeting cancellation/postponement beyond July 1, 2026.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: all levels sparse (total 1 usable case(s)); rate is wide by construction

cases.description: Banxico's previous unanimous decisions before the split; e.g., the March 2026 meeting was unanimous.
cases.basis_quote: The Governing Board unanimously decided to cut the target for the overnight interbank funding rate by 25 basis points to 6.75%.

banxico_gb.quorum: At least 3 members must be present to vote.
banxico_gb.consequence_of_nonparticipation: If fewer than 3 members are present, the meeting is postponed; if postponed beyond July 1, 2026, the question resolves No.
